parameters.query:
SELECT employee_id, name, month_year, monthly_late_count
FROM strike_counter
WHERE employee_id = '{{ $json.employee_id }}'
ORDER BY month_year ASC;

values.content:
=You are an HR analyst. Analyze this employee's late attendance pattern and be concise.

Employee: {{ $json.name }} ({{ $json.employee_id }})
Monthly History:
{{ $json.historyText }}

Answer these 3 points in exactly 3 short sentences:
1. Is the pattern improving, worsening or consistent?
2. Any specific months that stand out?
3. Risk level: Low / Medium / High and why?

Return ONLY the 3 sentences, no headers, no bullet points.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO daily_records (
    employee_id, 
    name, 
    department,
    designation,
    manager_name,
    manager_no,
    date_of_joining,
    date, 
    check_in, 
    check_out, 
    late_flag
)
VALUES (
    '{{ $json.employeeId }}', 
    '{{ $json.name }}', 
    '{{ $json.department }}', 
    '{{ $json.designation }}',
    '{{ $json.managerName }}',
    '{{ $json.managerNo }}',
    '{{ $json.dateOfJoining }}',
    '{{ $json.date }}', 
    '{{ $json.checkIn }}', 
    '{{ $json.checkOut }}', 
    '{{ $json.lateFlag }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (employee_id, date) DO UPDATE 
SET 
    check_in = EXCLUDED.check_in,
    check_out = EXCLUDED.check_out,
    late_flag = EXCLUDED.late_flag,
    department = EXCLUDED.department,
    designation = EXCLUDED.designation,
    manager_name = EXCLUDED.manager_name,
    manager_no = EXCLUDED.manager_no,
    date_of_joining = EXCLUDED.date_of_joining
RETURNING *;

INSERT INTO strike_counter (
    employee_id,
    name,
    department,
    designation,
    manager_name,
    manager_no,
    date_of_joining,
    month_year,
    monthly_late_count,
    last_warning_date,
    strike_level
)
VALUES (
    '{{ $json.employeeId }}',
    '{{ $json.name }}',
    '{{ $json.department }}',
    '{{ $json.designation }}',
    '{{ $json.managerName }}',
    '{{ $json.managerNo }}',
    '{{ $json.dateOfJoining }}',
    '{{ $json.monthYear }}',
    {{ $json.monthlyLateCount }},
    '{{ $json.lastWarningDate }}',
    {{ $json.strikeLevel }}
)
ON CONFLICT (employee_id, month_year) DO UPDATE
SET
    monthly_late_count = EXCLUDED.monthly_late_count,
    last_warning_date = EXCLUDED.last_warning_date,
    strike_level = EXCLUDED.strike_level,
    department = EXCLUDED.department,
    designation = EXCLUDED.designation,
    manager_name = EXCLUDED.manager_name,
    manager_no = EXCLUDED.manager_no,
    date_of_joining = EXCLUDED.date_of_joining
RETURNING *;

additionalFields.description: =3rd strike warning meeting for {{ $('Stagger Meeting Times').item.json.name }} ({{ $('Stagger Meeting Times').item.json.employee_id }}). Total late days this month: {{ $('Stagger Meeting Times').item.json.monthly_late_count }}

values.content:
==You are an HR assistant. Fill in the blanks in the template below using the employee details.
Do NOT change the structure. ONLY replace the [PLACEHOLDERS] with appropriate content.
Return ONLY the completed email body, nothing else.

---

Dear {{ $('Stagger Meeting Times').item.json.name }},

This is your 3rd and final warning regarding your attendance for {{ $('Stagger Meeting Times').item.json.month_year }}. Our records confirm that you have arrived late on {{ $('Stagger Meeting Times').item.json.monthly_late_count }} occasions this month, most recently on {{ $('Stagger Meeting Times').item.json.last_warning_date }}.

[WRITE 2 sentences explaining the seriousness of this final warning in a firm and professional tone]

A mandatory meeting has been scheduled for you — please check the calendar invite for the exact time: {{ $json.htmlLink }}

[WRITE 1 sentence stating that further action will be taken if punctuality does not improve immediately]

Best regards,
HR Department
Punctual.ai

=You are an HR assistant. Fill in the blanks in the template below using the employee details.
Do NOT change the structure. ONLY replace the [PLACEHOLDERS] with appropriate content.
Return ONLY the completed email body, nothing else.

---

Dear {{ $('Count Late Per Employee').item.json.name }},

We hope this message finds you well.

This is a formal warning regarding your attendance for {{ $('Count Late Per Employee').item.json.monthYear }}. Our records indicate that you have arrived late on {{ $('Count Late Per Employee').item.json.monthlyLateCount }} occasion(s) this month, most recently on {{ $('Count Late Per Employee').item.json.lastWarningDate }}.

[WRITE 2 sentences reminding the employee about the company punctuality policy in a firm but respectful tone]

[WRITE 1 sentence offering support if they are facing any personal or professional challenges]

Please note that continued tardiness will result in escalating disciplinary action.

Best regards,
HR Department
Punctual.ai

parameters.subject: =Attendance Warning - {{ $('Count Late Per Employee').item.json.name }} [ID: {{ $('Count Late Per Employee').item.json.employeeId }}]

parameters.query:
UPDATE strike_counter 
SET behaviour_analysis = '{{ $json.content.replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
WHERE employee_id = '{{ $('Format History Data').item.json.employee_id }}'
AND month_year = '{{ $('Format History Data').item.json.month_year }}';

INSERT INTO audit_log (event_type, description, employee_id, employee_name, action_by)
VALUES (
  'MEETING_SCHEDULED',
  'Warning meeting scheduled in Google Calendar',
  '{{ $('Stagger Meeting Times').item.json.employee_id }}',
  '{{ $('Stagger Meeting Times').item.json.name }}',
  'system'
);

INSERT INTO audit_log (event_type, description, employee_id, employee_name, action_by)
VALUES (
  'WARNING_ISSUED',
  'Warning email sent for late attendance',
  '{{ $('Count Late Per Employee').item.json.employeeId }}',
  '{{ $('Count Late Per Employee').item.json.name }}',
  'system'
);
